posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
General_employee kit_confetti1080×1314 27.7 KB

Get ready for an unforgettable experience at Elevate 2025, our annual community conference!

monday.com’s biggest event of the year is heading to New York, London, and Sydney🌍—and it’s shaping up to be something special!
Think: BIG ideas, REAL connections, HANDS-ON learning, and a whole lot of monday.com magic.

Exclusive Offer: Our community gets first dibs on Early Bird tickets!
Click here to register

We can’t wait to see you there!

NY September 17-18, 2025
London October 22-23, 2025
Sydney November 6, 2025

posts.author: babaopplex (baba)
posts.cookedHtml: Elevate 2025 sounds like a must-attend event! For anyone watching keynote previews, past talks, or promo clips on YouTube, Y2mate is a great way to download and save those videos for offline viewing—especially useful when prepping for conferences or sharing with your team.

posts.author: AlexanderTilde (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml: Hola, habrá algun evento que se vaya a realizar en CDMX este año?
